transition-colors","children":"James Park"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Tech Reviewer"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","6 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"February 5, 2026"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"The mouse you use for eight hours a day deserves more thought than you have given it. Here are the options worth considering."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"why-your-mouse-matters-more-than-you-think","children":"Why Your Mouse Matters More Than You Think"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Most people buy a mouse the way they buy a charging cable: as cheaply as possible, without much thought. This is a mistake. The mouse is the most-touched input device at your desk — most knowledge workers click and drag thousands of times per day."}}],"$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41","$L42","$L43","$L44"]}],"$L45","$L46","$L47"]}],"$L48"]}]]}]
49:I[94097,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
4a:I[24170,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
4b:I[55132,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505740420928-5e560c06d30e?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1524758631624-e2822e304c36?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
29:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A poor ergonomic fit causes wrist strain, forearm fatigue, and over time, repetitive strain injuries that are genuinely difficult to recover from. A good mouse is preventive medicine."}}]
2a:["$","h2","3",{"id":"the-grip-styles","children":"The Grip Styles"}]
2b:["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Before choosing a mouse, understand your grip:"}}]
2c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Palm grip</strong>: Your entire hand rests on the mouse. Requires a larger mouse with a high back. The most relaxed grip — good for long sessions."}}]
2d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Claw grip</strong>: Palm rests on the back, fingertips arch over the buttons. Precise and responsive. Suits medium to large mice."}}]
2e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Fingertip grip</strong>: Only the fingertips contact the mouse. Maximum precision, minimum contact. Suits smaller, lighter mice."}}]
2f:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Most ergonomic mice are designed for palm grip, as that is the posture associated with least strain."}}]
30:["$","h2","9",{"id":"vertical-mice-the-case-for-and-against","children":"Vertical Mice: The Case For and Against"}]
31:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Vertical mice hold your hand in a handshake position rather than palm-down. This eliminates the forearm rotation (pronation) that is the primary cause of mouse-related wrist strain."}}]
32:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The adjustment period is real — expect one to two weeks before a vertical mouse feels natural. After that, most users find them noticeably more comfortable than conventional mice for extended sessions."}}]
33:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best vertical mouse: Logitech MX Vertical</strong>. Premium build, excellent sensor, rechargeable via USB-C, wireless. The definitive vertical mouse for most people."}}]
34:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Budget pick: Anker Vertical Mouse</strong>. No software, basic features, but gets the geometry right at a fraction of the price."}}]
35:["$","h2","14",{"id":"trackball-mice","children":"Trackball Mice"}]
36:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A trackball keeps your hand still while the thumb or fingers rotate the ball to move the cursor. Zero wrist movement. Once you adapt, many users find trackballs dramatically reduce fatigue."}}]
37:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Logitech MX ERGO</strong> is the gold standard. Adjustable tilt angle, precise sensor, wireless. Heavy but stable."}}]
38:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Kensington Expert Mouse</strong> uses a large finger-operated ball rather than a thumb ball — different feel, very precise, excellent for design work."}}]
39:["$","h2","18",{"id":"conventional-ergonomic-mice","children":"Conventional Ergonomic Mice"}]
3a:["$","p","19",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If vertical mice feel too radical, several conventional mice are designed with ergonomics in mind:"}}]
3b:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Logitech MX Master 3S</strong>: One of the most refined conventional mice available. Excellent scroll wheel, customisable buttons, whisper-quiet clicks. Ideal for productivity and creative work."}}]
3c:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Microsoft Arc Mouse</strong>: Flat for travel, curves into an arc for use. Clever design, surprisingly comfortable for its size. Best for laptop users who travel."}}]
3d:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Razer Pro Click</strong>: Professional-grade wireless mouse with excellent sensor and calm, office-friendly design."}}]
3e:["$","h2","23",{"id":"ambidextrous-vs-handed","children":"Ambidextrous vs. Handed"}]
3f:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Most ergonomic mice are shaped for right-hand use. Left-handed users have fewer options. The <strong>Logitech MX Anywhere 3</strong> and vertical mice from Evoluent make left-handed versions. Check before buying."}}]
40:["$","h2","25",{"id":"dpi-and-sensitivity","children":"DPI and Sensitivity"}]
41:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"For productivity work (not gaming), DPI matters far less than marketing suggests. A sensor between 800–1600 DPI is perfectly adequate. What matters more is the ability to adjust sensitivity and save profiles — features available on most mid-range and premium mice."}}]
42:["$","h2","27",{"id":"the-bottom-line","children":"The Bottom Line"}]
43:["$","p","28",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If you use a mouse for more than four hours a day:"}}]
44:["$","ol","29",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Try a vertical mouse first — the ergonomic benefit is significant"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If vertical does not suit you, choose a palm-grip mouse with a comfortable arch"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Spend at least $40–60. Below that, build quality and sensor accuracy suffer noticeably"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Go wireless if possible. Fewer cables, more freedom of movement"}}]]}]
45:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Gear","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-orange-50 text-orange-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Gear"}],[["$","$L7","mouse",{"href":"/blog/tag/mouse","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","mouse"]}],["$","$L7","ergonomics",{"href":"/blog/tag/ergonomics","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","ergonomics"]}],["$","$L7","wrist-health",{"href":"/blog/tag/wrist-health","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","wrist-health"]}],["$","$L7","peripherals",{"href":"/blog/tag/peripherals","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","peripherals"]}]]]}]
46:["$","$L49",null,{"title":"Best Ergonomic Mice for Long Work Sessions in 2025","slug":"best-ergonomic-mice-2025"}]
47:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L4a",null,{}]}]
